HomeLaw FirmClinicAboutContact

Medical Placement For Personal Injury Law Firms

Hosvi connects personal injury law firms with trusted treatment providers and manages the placement process from case placement to scheduling. Injured clients are matched quickly with chiropractors and physical therapy clinics experienced in personal injury care.

Contact Us

How It Works

1

Legal Team Submits Case Details

Attorneys and case managers submit client information and treatment needs.

2

Hosvi Places Client with Clinic

We coordinate placement with an appropriate treatment provider clinic in our network.

3

Clinic Contacts Client

The clinic reaches out to schedule treatment, and care begins immediately.

Who We Serve

Personal Injury Law Firms

Chiropractor Clinics

Physical Therapy Clinics

Get in Touch
Hosvi

Hosvi is a medical placement coordination network connecting personal injury law firms with qualified treatment providers. We facilitate structured case placements between legal teams and independent clinics.
